arts.ttl: Barca rule out Camp Nou return this season and may have to wait until 2026
arts.sum: The latest update on the situation claims that the earliest Barca will be able to play at their famous old ground once again is in October 2025. Barcelona are also said to be some way off being able to secure the requisite permits needed by the fire service to host football matches at the ground.

arts.ttl: PSG vs. Liverpool: Arne Slot sent "favourites" warning before Champions League clash as Barcelona comparison made
arts.sum: Ex-Liverpool striker John Aldridge warns the Reds that they are no longer the favourites to win the Champions League following their nightmare draw.

arts.ttl: Lage expecting ‘great game’ against Barca as Benfica boss talks strategy
arts.sum: “I can’t predict how many goals will be scored in the match, but I can predict a great game of football because there are two teams that have their sights set on attacking,” he told reporters. “We will face a great team, with a lot of goals scored, but we also look at the positive things we did against this opponent, like the number of chances we had, the number of times we were in front of the goalkeeper.

arts.ttl: Barcelona star on top, Real Madrid way behind in 2nd: Europe’s top dribblers this season
arts.sum: An insight into the players with the best dribbling statistics in Europe’s top-5 leagues this season has on Tuesday been forthcoming online. The info comes courtesy of statisticians DataMB, and…

arts.ttl: Liverpool rival Barcelona for Leao - Wednesday's gossip
arts.sum: Liverpool are considering a move for AC Milan forward Rafael Leao, Liverpool striker Darwin Nunez was blocked from leaving in January and Manchester City are targeting Leicester's teenage sensation Jeremy Monga.

arts.ttl: Barcelona predicted lineup vs Benfica - Champions League
arts.sum: Predicting Barcelona's starting lineup for the first leg of their Champions League round of 16 tie against Benfica.

arts.ttl: Flick offers update on Gavi, talks competition with Dani Olmo
arts.sum: Barcelona face Benfica on Wednesday night in the first leg of their Champions League Round of 16 tie, and there’s a doubt in midfield as Gavi and Dani Olmo are fighting for the number 10 spot in the lineup. “Gavi can play in different positions, he presses and gives us a defensive attitude.

arts.ttl: Champions League Preview: FC Barcelona vs Benfica Projected Starting Lineups, Where to Watch in USA
arts.sum: FC Barcelona and Benfica will renew hostilities in the Round of 16 of the UCL after delivering arguably the game of the season a few weeks ago.

arts.ttl: Team News: Benfica vs. Barcelona injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Wednesday's Champions League clash between Benfica and Barcelona.

arts.ttl: Barcelona’s return to the Camp Nou could be delayed until 2026
arts.sum: A concerning update on the ongoing construction works at La Liga giants Barcelona’s Spotify Camp Nou stadium has on Tuesday surfaced online. The info comes courtesy of Relevo, and suggests…
